beginner.text: O gato preto pulou sobre o muro alto do jardim.
beginner.translation: The black cat jumped over the high garden wall.

beginner.text: Ela gosta de tomar café com leite pela manhã.
beginner.translation: She likes to drink coffee with milk in the morning.

beginner.text: Meu amigo mora em uma casa perto da praia.
beginner.translation: My friend lives in a house near the beach.

beginner.text: O livro está em cima da mesa.
beginner.translation: The book is on the table.

beginner.text: Eu como pão com manteiga no café da manhã.
beginner.translation: I eat bread with butter for breakfast.

beginner.text: A menina tem um cachorro pequeno.
beginner.translation: The girl has a small dog.

beginner.text: Nós vamos ao supermercado hoje.
beginner.translation: We are going to the supermarket today.

beginner.text: O céu está azul e bonito.
beginner.translation: The sky is blue and beautiful.

beginner.text: Ela trabalha em um escritório grande.
beginner.translation: She works in a big office.

beginner.text: As crianças brincam no parque.
beginner.translation: The children play in the park.

beginner.text: Eu preciso comprar pão na padaria.
beginner.translation: I need to buy bread at the bakery.

beginner.text: A água está muito quente hoje.
beginner.translation: The water is very hot today.

beginner.text: Minha irmã gosta de dançar ballet.
beginner.translation: My sister likes to dance ballet.

beginner.text: O jardim tem muitas flores coloridas.
beginner.translation: The garden has many colorful flowers.

beginner.text: Nós vamos ao cinema no sábado.
beginner.translation: We are going to the movies on Saturday.

beginner.text: O telefone está tocando agora.
beginner.translation: The phone is ringing now.

beginner.text: Ela usa óculos para ler livros.
beginner.translation: She wears glasses to read books.

beginner.text: O café da manhã está na mesa.
beginner.translation: Breakfast is on the table.

beginner.text: Meu pai trabalha em um hospital.
beginner.translation: My father works in a hospital.

beginner.text: A televisão está ligada.
beginner.translation: The television is on.

beginner.text: Os pássaros cantam pela manhã.
beginner.translation: The birds sing in the morning.

beginner.text: Ela gosta de sorvete de chocolate.
beginner.translation: She likes chocolate ice cream.

beginner.text: O ônibus está atrasado hoje.
beginner.translation: The bus is late today.

beginner.text: A porta está fechada.
beginner.translation: The door is closed.

beginner.text: Minha casa é pequena mas confortável.
beginner.translation: My house is small but comfortable.

beginner.text: O sol está brilhando hoje.
beginner.translation: The sun is shining today.

beginner.text: Meu cachorro gosta de brincar no parque.
beginner.translation: My dog likes to play in the park.

beginner.text: A biblioteca abre às nove horas.
beginner.translation: The library opens at nine o'clock.

beginner.text: Ela comprou um vestido novo.
beginner.translation: She bought a new dress.

beginner.text: O mercado fica perto da escola.
beginner.translation: The market is near the school.

beginner.text: Nós gostamos de música brasileira.
beginner.translation: We like Brazilian music.

beginner.text: A janela está aberta.
beginner.translation: The window is open.

beginner.text: Minha mãe faz um bolo delicioso.
beginner.translation: My mother makes a delicious cake.

beginner.text: O trem chega em cinco minutos.
beginner.translation: The train arrives in five minutes.

beginner.text: Eu tenho três irmãos.
beginner.translation: I have three brothers.

intermediate.text: Ontem à noite, decidimos jantar em um restaurante novo no centro da cidade.
intermediate.translation: Last night, we decided to have dinner at a new restaurant downtown.

intermediate.text: O professor explicou a lição de história enquanto os alunos tomavam notas.
intermediate.translation: The teacher explained the history lesson while the students took notes.

intermediate.text: Durante as férias, vamos viajar para Portugal e conhecer novos lugares.
intermediate.translation: During the vacation, we will travel to Portugal and visit new places.

intermediate.text: Ela estava lendo um livro interessante quando o telefone tocou.
intermediate.translation: She was reading an interesting book when the phone rang.

intermediate.text: Precisamos comprar ingredientes frescos para fazer o jantar de hoje.
intermediate.translation: We need to buy fresh ingredients to make dinner tonight.

intermediate.text: O filme que vimos ontem ganhou vários prêmios internacionais.
intermediate.translation: The movie we watched yesterday won several international awards.

intermediate.text: Depois de terminar o trabalho, vou encontrar meus amigos no café.
intermediate.translation: After finishing work, I will meet my friends at the café.

intermediate.text: A música portuguesa tem influências de várias culturas diferentes.
intermediate.translation: Portuguese music has influences from various different cultures.

intermediate.text: Ele tem estudado português há dois anos e já fala muito bem.
intermediate.translation: He has been studying Portuguese for two years and already speaks very well.

intermediate.text: Quando chegamos ao restaurante, não havia mais mesas disponíveis.
intermediate.translation: When we arrived at the restaurant, there were no more tables available.

intermediate.text: Enquanto ela cozinhava, ele arrumava a mesa.
intermediate.translation: While she was cooking, he was setting the table.

intermediate.text: Se não chover amanhã, iremos à praia.
intermediate.translation: If it doesn't rain tomorrow, we will go to the beach.

intermediate.text: O médico recomendou que eu fizesse mais exercícios.
intermediate.translation: The doctor recommended that I do more exercise.

intermediate.text: Antes de sair, verifique se todas as luzes estão apagadas.
intermediate.translation: Before leaving, check if all the lights are turned off.

intermediate.text: Ela tem estudado muito para passar no exame.
intermediate.translation: She has been studying a lot to pass the exam.

intermediate.text: O filme que vimos ontem foi premiado internacionalmente.
intermediate.translation: The movie we watched yesterday was internationally awarded.

intermediate.text: Quanto mais leio, mais aprendo.
intermediate.translation: The more I read, the more I learn.

intermediate.text: Assim que terminar o trabalho, vou te ligar.
intermediate.translation: As soon as I finish work, I'll call you.

intermediate.text: O restaurante onde jantamos estava lotado.
intermediate.translation: The restaurant where we had dinner was packed.

intermediate.text: Ela pediu que guardássemos silêncio durante a apresentação.
intermediate.translation: She asked that we keep quiet during the presentation.

intermediate.text: Apesar da chuva forte, a festa continuou.
intermediate.translation: Despite the heavy rain, the party continued.

intermediate.text: Quando eu era criança, morava numa fazenda.
intermediate.translation: When I was a child, I lived on a farm.

intermediate.text: Ele sugeriu que começássemos o projeto amanhã.
intermediate.translation: He suggested that we start the project tomorrow.

intermediate.text: A reunião foi cancelada devido ao mau tempo.
intermediate.translation: The meeting was cancelled due to bad weather.

intermediate.text: Depois de terminar a faculdade, pretendo viajar pelo mundo.
intermediate.translation: After finishing college, I intend to travel around the world.

intermediate.text: O livro que estou lendo foi escrito no século XIX.
intermediate.translation: The book I'm reading was written in the 19th century.

intermediate.text: Quanto mais cedo chegarmos, melhor será nossa posição na fila.
intermediate.translation: The earlier we arrive, the better our position in line will be.

intermediate.text: Ela tem trabalhado remotamente desde o início da pandemia.
intermediate.translation: She has been working remotely since the beginning of the pandemic.

advanced.text: Embora tivesse estudado bastante, ainda sentia-se inseguro sobre o exame.
advanced.translation: Although he had studied a lot, he still felt insecure about the exam.

advanced.text: Se eu pudesse voltar no tempo, teria feito escolhas diferentes na minha carreira.
advanced.translation: If I could go back in time, I would have made different choices in my career.

advanced.text: À medida que a tecnologia avança, precisamos adaptar-nos às mudanças constantes.
advanced.translation: As technology advances, we need to adapt to constant changes.

advanced.text: Caso não tivéssemos perdido o comboio, teríamos chegado a tempo para a reunião.
advanced.translation: If we hadn't missed the train, we would have arrived in time for the meeting.

advanced.text: Por mais que tentasse explicar, ninguém parecia compreender a complexidade da situação.
advanced.translation: No matter how much he tried to explain, nobody seemed to understand the complexity of the situation.

advanced.text: O livro cuja autora ganhou o Prêmio Nobel aborda questões sociais contemporâneas.
advanced.translation: The book whose author won the Nobel Prize addresses contemporary social issues.

advanced.text: Tendo terminado o projeto antes do prazo, a equipe pôde dedicar-se a novas iniciativas.
advanced.translation: Having finished the project before the deadline, the team was able to dedicate themselves to new initiatives.

advanced.text: Ainda que houvesse obstáculos, ela persistiu em seus objetivos até alcançá-los.
advanced.translation: Even though there were obstacles, she persisted in her objectives until achieving them.

advanced.text: O fenômeno cultural que se observa atualmente reflete as transformações sociais das últimas décadas.
advanced.translation: The cultural phenomenon that is currently observed reflects the social transformations of recent decades.

advanced.text: Mal sabia ele que aquela decisão aparentemente insignificante mudaria completamente o rumo de sua vida.
advanced.translation: Little did he know that that seemingly insignificant decision would completely change the course of his life.

advanced.text: Os investigadores, cujo trabalho revolucionou a medicina moderna, receberam reconhecimento internacional.
advanced.translation: The researchers, whose work revolutionized modern medicine, received international recognition.

advanced.text: Conforme avançamos na era digital, torna-se imperativo questionar o impacto da tecnologia na privacidade.
advanced.translation: As we advance in the digital age, it becomes imperative to question the impact of technology on privacy.

advanced.text: À medida que a sociedade evolui, novos desafios éticos surgem no campo da inteligência artificial.
advanced.translation: As society evolves, new ethical challenges emerge in the field of artificial intelligence.

advanced.text: Não obstante as dificuldades encontradas, a equipe conseguiu superar as expectativas iniciais.
advanced.translation: Notwithstanding the difficulties encountered, the team managed to exceed initial expectations.

advanced.text: O paradigma atual de consumo exige uma reflexão profunda sobre sustentabilidade.
advanced.translation: The current consumption paradigm demands a deep reflection on sustainability.

advanced.text: Caso tivéssemos previsto a magnitude do projeto, teríamos alocado mais recursos.
advanced.translation: Had we predicted the magnitude of the project, we would have allocated more resources.

advanced.text: A obra literária, cuja narrativa transcende o tempo, aborda questões universais da existência humana.
advanced.translation: The literary work, whose narrative transcends time, addresses universal questions of human existence.

advanced.text: Em face das mudanças climáticas, torna-se imperativo repensar nossos padrões de produção.
advanced.translation: In light of climate change, it becomes imperative to rethink our production patterns.

advanced.text: O estudo longitudinal, realizado ao longo de uma década, revelou padrões significativos de comportamento social.
advanced.translation: The longitudinal study, conducted over a decade, revealed significant patterns of social behavior.

advanced.text: Embora a tecnologia facilite a comunicação, paradoxalmente pode criar barreiras nas relações interpessoais.
advanced.translation: Although technology facilitates communication, it can paradoxically create barriers in interpersonal relationships.

advanced.text: A implementação das novas políticas públicas requer uma análise minuciosa dos impactos socioeconômicos.
advanced.translation: The implementation of new public policies requires a thorough analysis of socioeconomic impacts.

advanced.text: O fenômeno observado contradiz as teorias previamente estabelecidas no campo da física quântica.
advanced.translation: The observed phenomenon contradicts previously established theories in the field of quantum physics.

advanced.text: À luz dos recentes acontecimentos, faz-se necessária uma reavaliação das estratégias adotadas.
advanced.translation: In light of recent events, a reassessment of adopted strategies becomes necessary.

advanced.text: A interdisciplinaridade do projeto proporciona uma visão holística dos desafios contemporâneos.
advanced.translation: The project's interdisciplinarity provides a holistic view of contemporary challenges.

advanced.text: O manuscrito, cuja autenticidade foi recentemente comprovada, revela aspectos inéditos da história medieval.
advanced.translation: The manuscript, whose authenticity was recently proven, reveals unprecedented aspects of medieval history.

advanced.text: As transformações geopolíticas do século XXI exigem uma reconfiguração das relações internacionais.
advanced.translation: The geopolitical transformations of the 21st century require a reconfiguration of international relations.
